meanings.definition: a tract of land with few or no trees in the middle of a wooded area
the act of freeing from suspicion
the act of removing solid particles from a liquid
rid of obstructions
examples: Clear your desk

meanings.definition: make a way or path by removing objects
examples: Clear a path through the dense forest

meanings.definition: become clear
examples: The sky cleared after the storm

meanings.definition: grant authorization or clearance for
examples: Clear the manuscript for publication
The rock star never authorized this slanderous biography

meanings.definition: remove
examples: clear the leaves from the lawn
Clear snow from the road

meanings.definition: go unchallenged; be approved
examples: The bill cleared the House

meanings.definition: be debited and credited to the proper bank accounts
examples: The check will clear within 2 business days

meanings.definition: go away or disappear
examples: The fog cleared in the afternoon

meanings.definition: pass by, over, or under without making contact
examples: the balloon cleared the tree tops

meanings.definition: make free from confusion or ambiguity; make clear
examples: Could you clarify these remarks?
Clear up the question of who is at fault

meanings.definition: free from payment of customs duties, as of a shipment
examples: Clear the ship and let it dock

meanings.definition: clear from impurities, blemishes, pollution, etc.
examples: clear the water before it can be drunk

meanings.definition: yield as a net profit
examples: This sale netted me $1 million

meanings.definition: make as a net profit
examples: The company cleared $1 million

meanings.definition: earn on some commercial or business transaction; earn as salary or wages
examples: How much do you make a month in your new job?
She earns a lot in her new job
this merger brought in lots of money
He clears $5,000 each month

meanings.definition: sell
examples: We cleared a lot of the old model cars

meanings.definition: pass an inspection or receive authorization
examples: clear customs

meanings.definition: pronounce not guilty of criminal charges
examples: The suspect was cleared of the murder charges

meanings.definition: settle, as of a debt
examples: clear a debt
solve an old debt

meanings.definition: make clear, bright, light, or translucent
examples: The water had to be cleared through filtering

meanings.definition: rid of instructions or data
examples: clear a memory buffer

meanings.definition: remove (people) from a building
examples: clear the patrons from the theater after the bomb threat

meanings.definition: remove the occupants of
examples: Clear the building

meanings.definition: free (the throat) by making a rasping sound
examples: Clear the throat
